title: [32x] Eating animation
description: An add-on to make the Eating Animation mod bland in nicely with Faithful[​32x].
body:
![[32x] Eating animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PeAY2PBb/images/bfcde23389d8458d5755bfb2c3179503d41bb4fa.webp)

An add-on to make the [Eating animation mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) bland in nicely with [Faithful[​32x]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x).
